name: Split-token dodge via concatenation/join/f-string
recommendation: Do not assemble sensitive identifiers dynamically. Use explicit constants or imports.

name: Dynamic getattr/setattr using computed name
recommendation: Avoid computed attribute names for identifiers; use direct references or mapping dicts.

name: Dynamic import with constructed string
recommendation: Avoid dynamic imports built from expressions. Import explicit modules.

name: globals()/locals()/vars() key access with computed name
recommendation: Avoid resolving symbols via globals/locals with computed names.

name: Subprocess with shell=True
recommendation: Avoid shell=True; pass a list of args or sandbox in plugin layer.

name: Bare except swallowing (pass/return/log)
recommendation: Catch specific exceptions and handle appropriately.

name: Guardrail suppression comments without scope
recommendation: Avoid blanket suppressions; use next-line or fix the code.

name: Regex-based reconstruction using literal concatenation
recommendation: Avoid using regex substitutions to assemble forbidden tokens; use explicit constants.
